itemListElement.reviewBody:
Dear sir,
We are complaining since last one and half year to the transportation of buses for the students,from Katargam and varachha there are 18 students but the buses they are providing for the students are very worst,even after complaining they are not changing the buses instead of providing good buses they start give more worst buses so all the parents are not happy with this type of behaviour from the school transportation management,us we think they treat our students like they are coming from slums area,so please try provide good buses for the students for Katargam and varachha routes ,other all areas like adajan and Athwa lines we see they are providing very good buses so please take the action with the transportation management it’s humble request from all parents from Katargam and varachha.

itemListElement.reviewBody: "An exceptional school with a nurturing environment that fosters both academic excellence and personal growth. The dedicated teachers are passionate about their subjects and truly care about each student's success. The curriculum is engaging and well-rounded, offering a perfect balance between academics, extracurriculars, and character development. The sense of community is strong, making students feel supported and valued. Highly recommend for anyone seeking a top-quality education!"

itemReviewed.name: Tapti Valley International School - Ganga Nagar,Morabhagal

itemListElement.reviewBody: I visited this school a week ago with an intention to get my child's admission in Nursery. I had taken a prior appointment as traveling to this school from Surat city is quite a distance. To my disappointment, the school staff was lethargic and unorderly dressed. They did not show interest in interacting with new parents. They did not even bother to show me the school inside or outdoors (I have visited other schools too and all of them showed me the school.) I requested to meet the principal, but he/she wasn't really interested to meet. I requested for the school's broacher but to my surprise they did not have one. I asked them to explain me their teaching methodology but they did not answer. I asked them for the fees structure in detail but their answer was please check our website for all the answers. What kind of an attitude is that? If this was the case, you shouldn't have given an appointment for the school tour at all. Anyways, after this it is just not worth getting an admission into this school for my child. Very bad and disappointing!
